message:
fix(security): deep audit fixes across connectors and infrastructure crates

- Matrix: remove redundant double-encoding in query param construction
  (append_pair already handles URL encoding)
- fcp-oauth: fix RFC 6749 Section 2.3.1 compliance in Basic auth by
  form-encoding client_id and client_secret before concatenation
- fcp-crypto: reject all-zeros DH shared secret in X25519 to prevent
  small-subgroup/zero-point attacks (returns CryptoError::InvalidPublicKey)
- fcp-streaming: prevent infinite loop when BatchStream max_size=0
  (assert on construction), use saturating_add for health reconnect_count
- Update all callers of X25519 diffie_hellman() for new Result return type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
